case_title: DOUGHTRONICS INC DBA ACME BREAD CO VS BLISS RESTAURANT MANAGEMENT DBA JULIA RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BLISS RESTAURANT MANAGEMENT DBA JULIA RESTAURANT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,380.24 FILED BY DOUGHTRONICS INC DBA ACME BREAD CO AS TO DEFENDANT BLISS RESTAURANT MANAGEMENT DBA JULIA RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOUGHTRONICS INC DBA ACME BREAD CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLISS RESTAURANT MANAGEMENT DBA JULIA RESTAURANT $3,380.24 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,452.24, NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $112.09 AS TO DEFENDANT BLISS RESTAURANT MANAGEMENT DBA JULIA RESTAURANT
